import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=128, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2, num_heads=8, max_len=500):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed_dim = embed_dim
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

        # Separate embeddings for skill and correctness
        self.skill_embed = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_embed = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        self.pos_embed = nn.Embedding(max_len, embed_dim)

        encoder_layer = nn.TransformerEncoderLayer(
            d_model=embed_dim,
            nhead=num_heads,
            dim_feedforward=hidden_dim,
            dropout=dropout,
            batch_first=True,
            norm_first=True
        )
        self.encoder = nn.TransformerEncoder(encoder_layer, num_layers)

        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        )
        self.sigmoid = nn.Sigmoid()

    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape

        s_emb = self.skill_embed(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_embed(corrects)
        x = s_emb + c_emb

        pos = torch.arange(T, device=skill_ids.device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T)
        x = x + self.pos_embed(pos)

        # Causal mask: True means mask out (cannot attend)
        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=skill_ids.device), diagonal=1).bool()
        h = self.encoder(x, mask=mask)

        next_skills = skill_ids[:, 1:]
        next_skill_emb = self.skill_embed(next_skills)
        combined = torch.cat([h[:, :-1, :], next_skill_emb], dim=-1)
        logits = self.out(combined)
        probs = self.sigmoid(logits)
        return probs
